query:
SELECT v.id as "id!",
                      coalesce(array_agg(a.tag_id) FILTER (WHERE a.tag_id IS NOT NULL), '{}')
                          AS "tags!: Vec<Uuid>"
               FROM model_variants v
               LEFT JOIN variant_tag_assignments a ON a.variant_id = v.id
               WHERE v.model_id = $1
               GROUP BY v.id
